rulings.Case Title: VERA V WITIUK VS. JANE KNOP ET AL
rulings.Rulings: Real Property/Housing Court Law and Motion Calendar for Aug 02, 2019 line 9. Motion To Substitute Personal Representative GRANTED. Neil Lunty shall be substituted in. Prevailing party to prepare order. = (501/CFH)

rulings.Case Title: DEAN KAMAHELE VS. AEZ INVESTMENT, INC. A CALIFORNIA CORPORATION ET AL
rulings.Calendar Matter: Notice Of Motion And Motion By Aez Investment, Inc. To Deem Its Answer To Cross-Complaint And Cross-Complaint Filed As Of June 20, 2019, Or Alternatively, For Leave Of Court To File Same
rulings.Rulings: Real Property/Housing Court Law and Motion Calendar for Aug 02, 2019 line 1. DEFENDANT AEZ INVESTMENT, INC. A CALIFORNIA CORPORATION Notice Of Motion And Motion By Aez Investment, Inc. To Deem Its Answer To Cross-Complaint And Cross-Complaint Filed As Of June 20, 2019, Or Alternatively, For Leave Of Court To File Same GRANTED. No opposition filed. Moving party to file and serve its answer and cross-complaint no later than August 2, 2019 by 4:00 p.m. Moving party to prepare order deeming answer and cross-complaint filed as of June 20, 2018. Response to the cross-complaint shall be due in accordance with August 2, 2019 service date. = (501/CFH)

rulings.Case Title: JENNIFER SARKANY ET AL VS. CHRISTIE WEST ET AL
rulings.Calendar Matter: Notice Of Motion To Compel Financial Discovery Responses From Defendant Christie West
rulings.Rulings: Real Property/Housing Court Law and Motion Calendar for Aug 02, 2019 line 2. PLAINTIFF JENNIFER SARKANY, RAMSEY ABOUREMELEH, SANDRA FIERRO, NINA ROBINS Notice Of Motion To Compel Financial Discovery Responses From Defendant Christie West DENIED. Information provided by the defendant in discovery and via a declaration under the penalty of perjury constitutes a complete response to Plaintiff's discovery. Requests for sanctions are denied. = (501/CFH)

rulings.Calendar Matter: MOTION FOR SUMMARY JUDGMENT Notice Of Motion And Motion For Summary Judgment, Or, In The Alternative, Summary Adjudication Of Issues
rulings.Rulings: Real Property/Housing Court Law and Motion Calendar for Aug 02, 2019 line 3. PLAINTIFF BENITA CHIU MOTION FOR SUMMARY JUDGMENT Notice Of Motion And Motion For Summary Judgment, Or, In The Alternative, Summary Adjudication Of Issues DENIED. Moving party failed to shifts its burden and to show that the judgment in the prior action is void on its face as a a matter of law; failed to cite any binding authority on point standing for the proposition that a money judgment may only be awarded if avoidance of transfer is not available; and failed to shift its burden re: triable issue of fact because the determination as to whether a judgment is void is factually driven, as is evident from the cases cited by the moving party, and the material facts are not listed in the separate statement. = (501/CFH)

rulings.Case Title: RICK HOLMAN VS. JOGN MCMAHON ET AL
rulings.Calendar Matter: Petitioner'S Notice Of Hearing Oon Petition For Release Of Property From Lien
rulings.Rulings: Real Property/Housing Court Law and Motion Calendar for Aug 02, 2019 line 4. PLAINTIFF RICK HOLMAN Petitioner'S Notice Of Hearing Oon Petition For Release Of Property From Lien OFF CALENDAR per request of the moving party. = (501/CFH)

rulings.Case Title: CHOO KOON NG VS. DAMIEN QUINN ET AL
rulings.Calendar Matter: MOTION TO STRIKE AMENDED ANSWER TO 1ST AMENDED COMPLAINT
rulings.Rulings: Real Property/Housing Court Law and Motion Calendar for Aug 02, 2019 line 5. PLAINTIFF CHOO NG MOTION TO STRIKE AMENDED ANSWER TO 1ST AMENDED COMPLAINT OFF CALENDAR, insufficient notice per CCP 1005 and CCP 1013. Motion filed and served by mail on July 10, 2019. The earliest proper hearing date for the date and method of service would have been August 6, 2019. = (501/CFH)

rulings.Case Title: PROLOGIS L.P. VS. DESOTO CAB COMPANY, INC. ET AL ***(case is a regular civil case)***
rulings.Rulings: Real Property/Housing Court Law and Motion Calendar for Aug 02, 2019 line 6. DEFENDANT DESOTO CAB COMPANY, INC. MOTION TO STRIKE 1ST AMENDED COMPLAINT DENIED. Moving party failed to cite any authority for the proposition that allegations regarding rent or daily damages are irrelevant, false, improper or not drawn in conformity with the laws. Plaintiff's invitation to deny the motion for failure to meet and confer is denied. CCP 435.5(d)(2). = (501/CFH)
